_note: CONSTRUCTED evaluation scenario for H7 (defeasible reconciliation). Claims are illustrative fixtures. This directory is intentionally separate from seed_data/rules/ and is never seeded into, or counted toward, the verified rule corpus.
description: Provenance tie-break: two claims share jurisdiction tier, document priority, and specificity, so neither jurisdiction nor lex specialis separates them. The claim tracing to the higher-authority source (FHWA guidance, weight 0.9) defeats the locally derived heuristic (weight 0.5). A 62-mph limit is compliant under the governing FHWA claim; the heuristic's opposite verdict is overridden.

claims.name: Rural Two-Lane Posted Speed Ceiling (FHWA, constructed)
claims.citation: FHWA Speed Limit Setting Guidance (constructed fixture)
claims.description: Guidance ceiling: posted speed at most 65 mph on rural two-lane highways.

claims.name: Legacy Corridor Speed Heuristic (derived, constructed)
claims.citation: Legacy corridor study heuristic, uncited (constructed fixture)
claims.description: Derived heuristic without manual citation: posted speed at most 60 mph.
